calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2011 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Michael Begert, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha , CSR: C. Yount #2737

Zach Toran, Esq. specialy appeared for plaintiff American Express Bank, FSB.
Order waiving live testimony was in file.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Harry He as follows:

Damages/Principal - $27,761.18
Attorney Fees - $800.00
Pre-judgment Interest - $1,445.10
Costs - $435.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $30,441.28

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
